## Review

Before merging, paste the following as a PR comment to trigger the multi-agent review, then update `## Last Review` in `AGENTS.md`:

```
@claude Review this PR across four dimensions:

**🏛️ Architect** — Does this align with `docs/architecture.md`? Any new Known Mismatches?
**📋 Requirements** — Does this satisfy `docs/requirements.md`? Any gaps or new implied requirements?
**🔍 Code Reviewer** — C#/.NET / React / C++ best practices. Prioritise code reduction. Flag non-idiomatic patterns.
**⚙️ Infrastructure** — CI config, GitVersion, branch name (`feature/*`/`hotfix/*`), conventional commits.

After reviewing, suggest the update line for the `## Last Review` table in `AGENTS.md`.
```

- [ ] Review completed
- [ ] `AGENTS.md` Last Review table updated
